name: Dukka (Mid East Spice)
recipeIngredient: 75 g (3 oz) hazelnuts or roasted chick peas
1 tsp dried wild thyme or mint
recipeInstructions:
1. Dry roast sesame seeds until lightly browned, then remove from the pan.
2. Roast hazelnuts for about 5 minutes; peel any skins off chick peas (no further roasting needed).
3. Roast coriander and cumin seeds until they darken.
4. Allow all ingredients to cool completely.
5. Combine everything in a mortar or food processor and grind/pound into a coarse powder.
6. Store the mixture in an airtight jar at room temperature for up to 3 months.
Serve with bread, dipping first in olive oil and then into dukka.
